subject: Welcome to {{institution_name}}, {{student_name}}
title: Student registration received
preheader: Your Mtendere student profile is active.
body:
Hello {{student_name}},

Your student profile has been created. We will use this account to coordinate applications, payments, documents, and follow-up notifications.

Reference: {{reference_id}}

issues.message: Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Your Mtendere inquiry is in progress - {{lead_name}}
title: Inquiry received
preheader: The Mtendere team will review your study goals and follow up with next steps.
body:
Hello {{lead_name}},

Thank you for contacting {{institution_name}}. We have recorded your interest in {{interest_area}}.

An advisor will review your details and guide you on the most relevant next step.

Reference: {{reference_id}}

subject: Application Received - {{student_name}}
title: Application received
preheader: Your application is now in the Mtendere review workflow.
body:
Hello {{student_name}},

Your application for {{program_name}} has been received.

The Mtendere team will review your submitted details, documents, and next-step readiness.

Reference: {{reference_id}}

issues.message: Consider adding a clear next action for this email.
Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Enrollment Confirmation - {{student_name}}
title: Enrollment confirmed
preheader: Your enrollment record has been confirmed.
body:
Hello {{student_name}},

Your enrollment for {{course_name}} has been confirmed with {{institution_name}}.

Status: {{enrollment_status}}

Reference: {{reference_id}}

issues.message: Consider adding a clear next action for this email.
Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Application Approved - {{student_name}}
title: Application approved
preheader: Your application has been approved.
body:
Hello {{student_name}},

Your application for {{program_name}} has been approved.

The Mtendere team will guide you through the next steps and document requirements.

Reference: {{reference_id}}

issues.message: Consider adding a clear next action for this email.
Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Payment Confirmation - {{reference_id}}
title: Payment received
preheader: Your payment has been recorded.
body:
Hello {{recipient_name}},

We have recorded your payment of {{amount}} {{currency}}.

Status: {{payment_status}}

Reference: {{reference_id}}

{{document_notice}}

issues.message: Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Invoice Generated - {{invoice_number}}
title: Invoice generated
preheader: A Mtendere invoice is ready for review.
body:
Hello {{recipient_name}},

Your invoice for {{amount}} {{currency}} has been generated.

Invoice: {{invoice_number}}

Due date: {{due_date}}

{{document_notice}}

issues.message: Consider adding a clear next action for this email.
Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Payment Issue - {{reference_id}}
title: Payment could not be confirmed
preheader: A payment attempt needs attention.
body:
Hello {{recipient_name}},

We could not confirm the payment attempt for {{amount}} {{currency}}.

Status: {{payment_status}}

Reference: {{reference_id}}

{{message}}

{{#if payment_status=overdue}}

Action required: Please complete this payment to avoid delays in admissions processing.

{{/if}}

defaults.message: Please contact support if you need help completing this payment.

issues.message: Template body does not mention support/contact context.

A new admin account has been created.

title: Role updated
body: Role {{role}} was updated by {{updated_by}}. Reference: {{reference_id}}.
Mtendere: payment {{amount}} {{currency}} received. Ref {{reference_id}}.
Mtendere: payment not confirmed. Ref {{reference_id}}. Contact support if this looks wrong.

title: {{event_title}}
body: {{message}}

subject: Enrollment Confirmation
title: Enrollment Confirmation
body: This confirms that {{student_name}} has been enrolled for {{course_name}}. Enrollment status: {{enrollment_status}}.

subject: Payment Receipt
title: Payment Receipt
body: This confirms receipt of {{amount}} {{currency}} from {{recipient_name}}. Payment status: {{payment_status}}.

subject: Invoice
title: Invoice
body: Invoice {{invoice_number}} has been generated for {{recipient_name}} in the amount of {{amount}} {{currency}}. Due date: {{due_date}}.

subject: Admission Letter
title: Admission Letter
body: We are pleased to confirm that {{student_name}} has been approved for {{program_name}}. Please follow the next-step guidance shared by the administration team.

subject: Offer Letter
title: Offer Letter
body: This letter confirms that {{student_name}} has received an offer for {{program_name}} subject to the conditions communicated by administration.

subject: Acceptance Letter
title: Acceptance Letter
body: This letter confirms that {{student_name}} has accepted the offer for {{program_name}}. Mtendere will continue to guide the required next steps.

subject: Enrollment Certificate
title: Enrollment Certificate
body: This certificate confirms that {{student_name}} is enrolled in {{course_name}} with enrollment status {{enrollment_status}}.

subject: Recommendation Letter
title: Recommendation Letter
body: Mtendere Education Consult provides this recommendation for {{student_name}} in support of {{recommendation_purpose}}. {{body_content}}

preheader: A platform alert needs attention.
body:
Alert: {{event_title}}

{{message}}

Reference: {{reference_id}}

issues.message: Consider adding a clear next action for this email.
Template body does not mention support/contact context.

subject: Admin User Created - {{admin_email}}
title: Admin user created
preheader: A new administrative account was created.
body:
A new admin account has been created.

Email: {{admin_email}}

Role: {{role}}

Created by: {{created_by}}

issues.message: Consider adding a clear next action for this email.
Template body does not mention support/contact context.

title: Role updated
body: Role {{role}} was updated by {{updated_by}}. Reference: {{reference_id}}.
Mtendere: payment {{amount}} {{currency}} received. Ref {{reference_id}}.
Mtendere: payment not confirmed. Ref {{reference_id}}. Contact support if this looks wrong.
Mtendere security alert: {{event_title}}. Ref {{reference_id}}.
Mtendere payment update: {{amount}} {{currency}} received and recorded. Ref {{reference_id}}. Keep this reference for follow-up.
Mtendere security alert: {{event_title}}. Please review your account/admin console. Ref {{reference_id}}.

title: {{event_title}}
body: {{message}}

subject: Enrollment Confirmation
title: Enrollment Confirmation
body: This confirms that {{student_name}} has been enrolled for {{course_name}}. Enrollment status: {{enrollment_status}}.

subject: Payment Receipt
title: Payment Receipt
body: This confirms receipt of {{amount}} {{currency}} from {{recipient_name}}. Payment status: {{payment_status}}.

subject: Invoice
title: Invoice
body: Invoice {{invoice_number}} has been generated for {{recipient_name}} in the amount of {{amount}} {{currency}}. Due date: {{due_date}}.

subject: Admission Letter
title: Admission Letter
body: We are pleased to confirm that {{student_name}} has been approved for {{program_name}}. Please follow the next-step guidance shared by the administration team.

subject: Offer Letter
title: Offer Letter
body: This letter confirms that {{student_name}} has received an offer for {{program_name}} subject to the conditions communicated by administration.

subject: Acceptance Letter
title: Acceptance Letter
body: This letter confirms that {{student_name}} has accepted the offer for {{program_name}}. Mtendere will continue to guide the required next steps.

subject: Enrollment Certificate
title: Enrollment Certificate
body: This certificate confirms that {{student_name}} is enrolled in {{course_name}} with enrollment status {{enrollment_status}}.

subject: Recommendation Letter
title: Recommendation Letter
body: Mtendere Education Consult provides this recommendation for {{student_name}} in support of {{recommendation_purpose}}. {{body_content}}

defaults.body_content: The student has engaged with the Mtendere administration team for education guidance and documented follow-up.
